413 M3 M3_HIST_ULCER (M3) History of Resolved Ulcers CHAR 1 Skin condition: history of resolved ulcers. This field indicates if the resident had an ulcer that was resolved or cured in the lat 90 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
